Page.Width: {Binding RelativeSource={RelativeSource Mode=FindAncestor, AncestorType={x:Type ContentControl}}, Path=ActualWidth, FallbackValue=700}
Page.Height: {Binding RelativeSource={RelativeSource Mode=FindAncestor, AncestorType={x:Type ContentControl}}, Path=ActualHeight, FallbackValue=700}

Run.Text: Use time compression to move the scenario along when necessary.

Let's now discuss 'other methods' of detection - this refers to any method outside the sensors available to our ships and aircraft. Typically, contacts detected externally will be delivered to us in the form of in-game popup messages and 'Intel' messages saved into the Event Log.

Methods of detection that may be passed to us by higher command include underwater hydrophone array contacts (SOSUS), radar ocean reconnaissance satellite (RORSAT) passes over the area, and even radioed reports from fishermen sighting warships or periscopes! This behavior will be programmed into scenarios and is not generally 'dynamic' in Early Access. Click 'Next' for an example.
